postalAddress.source: (project convention: Parliament Office postal address used across many MPs when electorate office address unavailable)
postalAddress.notes: Parliament.nz MP contact page blocked by Radware captcha from this environment; ACT profile did not provide an electorate/parliament postal address. Using standard Parliament Office postal address as fallback.

donationMethod.details: No public, MP-specific donation method found. ACT provides a party donation form.
donationMethod.notes: ACT profile links to party donate page.

sourcesChecked.notes: Blocked by Radware captcha / HTTP response code failure in Playwright; could not access contact details.
No MP postal address listed; profile includes a Donate link.
